title: Construction Business App — Initial Build

requirements.text: Create a dashboard home screen that displays a summary of active projects, upcoming tasks, and key business metrics (e.g., total projects, completed projects, pending tasks).

quotes: Create an app for my construction business

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows count of active, completed, and total projects
Upcoming tasks are listed with due dates
Metrics update when underlying data changes

requirements.text: Implement project management: allow users to create, view, edit, and delete construction projects. Each project should have a name, description, status (Planning / In Progress / Completed), start date, end date, and budget.

quotes: Create an app for my construction business

acceptanceCriteria: User can create a new project with all required fields
Projects are listed with their status and dates
User can edit any project field
User can delete a project
Project data persists in the backend

requirements.text: Implement task management within each project: allow users to add, edit, complete, and delete tasks. Each task should have a title, assignee name, due date, and status (To Do / In Progress / Done).

quotes: Create an app for my construction business

acceptanceCriteria: Tasks are visible inside their parent project view
User can add a task with title, assignee, due date, and status
User can mark a task as done
User can delete a task
Task data persists in the backend

requirements.text: Implement a client directory: allow users to add, view, edit, and delete client records. Each client should have a name, phone number, email, and associated projects.

quotes: Create an app for my construction business

acceptanceCriteria: Client list is accessible from main navigation
User can create a client with name, phone, and email
User can associate a client with one or more projects
User can edit and delete client records

requirements.text: Apply a bold, industrial visual theme inspired by construction: use a dark charcoal and warm amber/orange color palette, strong typography with clear hierarchy, card-based layouts for projects and tasks, and a persistent left sidebar navigation with icons for Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, and Clients. Enforce this style consistently across all pages.

quotes: Create an app for my construction business

acceptanceCriteria: Dark charcoal background with amber/orange accent colors throughout
Sidebar navigation is visible on all pages with working links
Cards are used to display project and task summaries
Typography is bold and legible with clear visual hierarchy
Theme is consistent across Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, and Clients views

requirements.text: Render the generated logo and hero banner images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated and display them in the app header/dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo appears in the sidebar or top navigation bar
Hero banner is displayed on the dashboard page
Images load from frontend/public/assets/generated

constraints: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
No external databases or third-party services
nonGoals: User authentication or Internet Identity login

required: Bold construction company logo mark with a hard hat and wrench icon on a dark charcoal background with amber accent color (logo.dim_256x256.png)
Wide dashboard hero banner featuring a construction site skyline silhouette with crane, warm amber and charcoal gradient sky (hero-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
